title: Upcoming Webinar: How Hiring Teams Build Smarter Pipelines on monday CRM

posts.author: Carson (Carson Butcher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Calling all recruiters, HR teams, and monday CRM users!

Is your hiring process stretched across forms, spreadsheets, email threads, and siloed tools?

We’re hosting a free webinar in the monday mansion next week to show how hiring teams are building smarter, more connected workflows using monday CRM.

Form intake → candidate pipelines
Collaboration between recruiters & hiring managers
Automations, dashboards, and visibility
Tangible ways to leverage AI capabilities
Use cases for internal teams and agencies

July 30th at 1 PM ET
Save your seat: carbonweb.co/webinar

Whether you’re just getting started with monday CRM or looking to scale your setup, this session is packed with tactical examples and real-world insights you can take back to your team.

Look forward to seeing you there!
